Video.summary: October 28, 2023 - It's the English Nationals Open in the Bolton Arena, Greater Manchester. Teams face off to compete for victory!
Video.title: English Nationals 2023 - Women's Doubles Open - Group B - 1

Image.alt: English Nationals 2023 - Women's Doubles Open - Group B - 1
English Nationals 2023 - Women's Doubles Open - Group B - 1
English Nationals 2023 - Women's Doubles Open - Group B - 1

Video.summary: Experience the exciting Women's Doubles Open 4.5+ Final from the 2023 English Open held at Bolton Arena, Greater Manchester. This match features dynamic teams: Megan Fudge and Susannah Barr face off against Lee Whitwell and Riley Bohnert in a highly competitive final. Follow expert commentary highlighting key plays including Susannah Barr’s precise lobs, Megan Fudge’s powerful forehand, and strategic teamwork. See how the match unfolds in a best-of-three games format with a hard stop on time. This showcase of top-level English pickleball captures the skill, tactics, and intensity of the sport. Stay tuned for post-match insights and upcoming mixed doubles action.
Video.title: English Open 2023 – Women’s Doubles 4.5+ Final – Fudge & Barr vs Whitwell & Bohnert

Image.alt: English Open 2023 – Women’s Doubles 4.5+ Final – Fudge & Barr vs Whitwell & Bohnert
English Open 2023 – Women’s Doubles 4.5+ Final – Fudge & Barr vs Whitwell & Bohnert
English Open 2023 – Women’s Doubles 4.5+ Final – Fudge & Barr vs Whitwell & Bohnert

Video.summary: The high-voltage group stage of the World Pickleball League (WPL) nears its end on Day 8 with a crucial tie between the Hyderabad Superstars and the Chennai Super Champs. The commentary team sets the stage for a tense match, which is determined by an incredibly close final scoreline and points difference, with all six teams still in the running for the four semi-final spots. Also witness the Exhibition Match of the Century featuring Bollywood superstars Aamir Ali (Team Aamir) and Ali Fazal (Team Ali), live from the CCI Brabourne Stadium.
Video.title: WPBL 2025 - Hyderabad vs. Chennai - Day 8 Tie 1 + Bollywood Exhibition Match

Image.alt: WPBL 2025 - Hyderabad vs. Chennai - Day 8 Tie 1 + Bollywood Exhibition Match
WPBL 2025 - Hyderabad vs. Chennai - Day 8 Tie 1 + Bollywood Exhibition Match
WPBL 2025 - Hyderabad vs. Chennai - Day 8 Tie 1 + Bollywood Exhibition Match

Video.summary: The World Pickleball League returns for an explosive Season 2 at the iconic Jio World Garden in BKC, Mumbai. The season opener features a high-stakes rematch of last year's final: the defending champion Bengaluru Jawans, owned by cinematic powerhouse Atlee and Priya Atlee, take on the formidable Pune United, led by owner Riteish Deshmukh. Witness world-class athletes from 18 countries compete in a series of intense Men’s Singles, Women’s Doubles, and Mixed Doubles matches. With the pressure of a "Davis Cup" atmosphere and the precision of tactical "kitchen" play, both teams battle for every point to establish early dominance in India’s premier pickleball league.
Video.title: WPBL 2026 - Bengaluru vs Pune - Day 1 Tie 1

Image.alt: WPBL 2026 - Bengaluru vs Pune - Day 1 Tie 1
WPBL 2026 - Bengaluru vs Pune - Day 1 Tie 1
WPBL 2026 - Bengaluru vs Pune - Day 1 Tie 1

Video.summary: NCPA Championship: Utah Valley vs Utah Tech in the 2025 NCPA Championships from Las Vegas.
Video.title: NCPA Championship: Utah Tech vs. Utah Valley

Image.alt: NCPA Championship: Utah Tech vs. Utah Valley
NCPA Championship: Utah Tech vs. Utah Valley
NCPA Championship: Utah Tech vs. Utah Valley

Video.summary: Experience the pinnacle of collegiate pickleball as Virginia Tech and Liberty University battle for the NCPA 2025 Virginia Beach Regional title. This high-stakes championship matchup features a prize pool of $2,500 and a chance for regional dominance.The action kicks off with an elite men’s doubles match featuring Liberty’s Ben Rice and Derek Cray against Virginia Tech’s undefeated Cody Miller and Caelan Funk. The broadcast also captures intense singles play and critical mixed doubles rallies as both teams fight through high-tension dink battles and "Dreambreaker" level strategy. Watch for standout defensive plays, including ATP (Around the Post) attempts and high-speed hand battles on the Championship Court at Pickleball Virginia Beach.
Video.title: Team Championship Match - Virginia Tech vs. Liberty University

Image.alt: Team Championship Match - Virginia Tech vs. Liberty University
Team Championship Match - Virginia Tech vs. Liberty University
Team Championship Match - Virginia Tech vs. Liberty University

Video.summary: NCPA Round of 64: University of California, Irvine vs University of Central Florida
Video.title: NCPA Round of 64: UCI vs. UCF

Image.alt: NCPA Round of 64: UCI vs. UCF
NCPA Round of 64: UCI vs. UCF
NCPA Round of 64: UCI vs. UCF

Video.summary: Live from the NCPA Virginia Beach Regional 2025, this pivotal collegiate team match features Kennesaw State (KSU) facing off against Virginia Tech. The action kicks off with a mixed doubles showdown chosen by coin-toss winner Virginia Tech.Watch as Virginia Tech's Cody Miller and Heather Murphy bring their A-game against KSU's Yuri Yadi and Sophia Fiona. The match also features men's doubles with Kellen Funk and Cody Miller representing the Hokies, while Parth Modi and his partner fight to keep KSU's hopes alive. With crucial seeding for bracket play on the line, both teams battle through intense rallies and strategic plays in this pool play matchup.
Video.title: NCPA Virginia Beach Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - Kennesaw State vs. Virginia Tech

Image.alt: NCPA Virginia Beach Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - Kennesaw State vs. Virginia Tech
NCPA Virginia Beach Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - Kennesaw State vs. Virginia Tech
NCPA Virginia Beach Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - Kennesaw State vs. Virginia Tech

Video.summary: In the exciting championship match of Picklebowl 2023, pro pickleball player Kyle Yates teams up with Picklebowl host and former NFL quarterback Danny Wuerffel to challenge the fierce duo of Anna Bright, a top female pro and former collegiate tennis star, and Ameen Hafez. This charity event brings together athletes and celebrities representing their alma maters in a competitive battle for the Picklebowl trophy. Commentary by Dave Fleming and special guest Marcellus Wiley highlights the skill, strategy, and drama on court. Watch intense rallies, strategic plays, and hear insider insights as these top players compete for the title. Don’t miss the dynamic energy and social spirit of pickleball in this must-see final.
Video.title: Picklebowl 2023 – Mixed Doubles Final – Yates & Wuerffel vs Bright & Hafez

Image.alt: Picklebowl 2023 – Mixed Doubles Final – Yates & Wuerffel vs Bright & Hafez
Picklebowl 2023 – Mixed Doubles Final – Yates & Wuerffel vs Bright & Hafez
Picklebowl 2023 – Mixed Doubles Final – Yates & Wuerffel vs Bright & Hafez

Video.summary: Get ready for a one-of-a-kind pickleball experience at the Minto U.S. Open Pickleball Championships, powered by Margaritaville. This video features highlights from the Pro Mixed Doubles match between Valdes/Gabrielsen and Barr/Lane. Watch Brandon Lane's commanding presence on the court, as he strategically positions himself at the kitchen line to capture any balls he can. The tournament is held at a beautiful facility in Naples, Florida, which is unlike any other in the world, and draws tens of thousands of people.
Video.title: US Open 2025 - Pro Mixed Doubles - Valdes/Gabrielsen vs. Barr/Lane

Image.alt: US Open 2025 - Pro Mixed Doubles - Valdes/Gabrielsen vs. Barr/Lane
US Open 2025 - Pro Mixed Doubles - Valdes/Gabrielsen vs. Barr/Lane
US Open 2025 - Pro Mixed Doubles - Valdes/Gabrielsen vs. Barr/Lane

Video.summary: Watch as Pickleball Pros Dan Granot and Phillip Phillips, paired with NFL legend Brandon Siler and Pickleball professional Ryan Sherry, battle it out in this thrilling Men's Doubles match from the Picklebowl 2022. Filmed in the stunning Sea Island, Georgia, this unique event brings together celebrities and professional athletes representing their alma maters. The game is not only about competition but also raising funds for a great cause, benefiting Desire Street Ministries. With star power from both the sports and entertainment worlds, this exciting match is filled with hard-hitting shots, strategic play, and thrilling moments that will keep you on the edge of your seat.
Video.title: Picklebowl 2022 – Men’s Doubles – Granot & Siler vs Phillips & Sherry

Image.alt: Picklebowl 2022 – Men’s Doubles – Granot & Siler vs Phillips & Sherry
Picklebowl 2022 – Men’s Doubles – Granot & Siler vs Phillips & Sherry
Picklebowl 2022 – Men’s Doubles – Granot & Siler vs Phillips & Sherry
